name: Autumn Cheesecake2
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese (for body): 2 packages, 8 ounces each
Apple slices (for topping): Thin peeled apple slices, 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind graham cracker crumbs: 1 cup
Combine sugar and cinnamon with melted margarine (3 tablespoons) until well mixed.
Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Prepare cream cheese layer:
In a large bowl, combine softened cream cheese (2 packages), sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Mix on medium speed until well blended.
3. Assemble topping:
Toss apple slices with sugar, cinnamon, and chopped pecans.
Pour the mixture over the cream cheese layer in the springform pan.
4. Bake: Place the assembled cheesecake back into the preheated oven at 350°F.
Cook for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until set.
5. Remove from oven and cool: Let the cheesecake cool completely before removing it from the rim of the springform pan.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
